septal
  • API reference
  • Utilities
  • View page source

Utilities

General-purpose utilities for septal.

These are backend-agnostic helpers used by both solver implementations.

septal.casadax.utilities.clean_up(objects)[source]

Delete a list of objects to free memory.

Return type:

None

septal.casadax.utilities.generate_initial_guess(n_starts, n_d, bounds)[source]

Generate Sobol-sequence initial guesses within bounds.

Parameters:

  • n_starts (int) – Number of initial points to generate.

  • n_d (int) – Dimension of the decision variable.

  • bounds (List[Any]) – [lb, ub] — each array-like of shape (n_d,).

Returns:

Shape (n_starts, n_d).

Return type:

Any

septal.casadax.utilities.unpack_results(solutions, fallback_solver, fallback_solution)[source]

Pick the best solution from a multi-start result list.

Parameters:

  • solutions (list) – List of (solver, solution) pairs from successful IPOPT runs.

  • fallback_solver (Any) – Solver object to use when solutions is empty.

  • fallback_solution (Any) – Solution object to use when solutions is empty.

Return type:

tuple

Note

generate_initial_guess() uses scipy.stats.qmc.Sobol with scramble=True, seed=42 for reproducible quasi-random initial points. The same seed is used across all septal test suites.
